name: Varangis Avepe S.A.
summary: Varangis Avepe S.A. designs, manufactures, and sells furniture and home interior products in Greece and internationally. The company provides home furniture products, including seating products, beds, tables, case furniture, occasional tables, upholstered pieces, and accessories, as well as textiles comprising duvets, pillowcases, sheets, bedspreads, blankets, throws, terry towels, bathrobes, pajamas, table linens, kitchen towels, aprons, details, and various accessories under the Lexington brand. It also offers office furniture products comprising acoustic paneling system, meeting, storage system, demountable partition system, group seating, workstation, task chair, and executive and lounge seating furniture, as well as reception and conference/theater/lecture hall furniture products. In addition, the company is involved in the development and implementation of custom designs, including work environments, as well as professional space solutions in partnership with various firms, architectural materials, and historic building restoration and turnkey interior architecture projects in the European Union, the Balkans, and the Persian Gulf. It serves customers in the professional spaces, banking institutions, retail networks, conference facilities, landmark buildings, hotels, and luxurious mega-yacht interiors. The company was founded in 1900 and is headquartered in Marousi, Greece.
